title: rudgea sessilis subsp. sessilis
intro: Rudgea sessilis subsp. sessilis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub native to tropical regions of Central and South America, and is also known as 'Lipstick Tree' or 'Red Bush'. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as wound healing, fever reduction, and anti-bacterial properties. The leaves of the Rudgea sessilis subsp. sessilis plant are used to prepare herbal remedies, which can be taken internally or applied topically, often in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures.
